goals.title: Complete NFI Engine M1 approval gate after explicit user okay. Delive...
goals.objective: Complete NFI Engine M1 approval gate after explicit user okay. Deliverable: F1-F4 in .omo/plans/nfi-engine.md are marked complete, .omo/start-work/ledger.jsonl records final completion, .omo/boulder.json marks nfi-engine-m1 complete, and no QA runtime residue remains. Success criteria: 1) Plan compliance: run python3 scripts/verify_plan_evidence.py .omo/plans/nfi-engine.md .omo/evidence and capture PLAN_EVIDENCE_OK referenced=118 missing=0 in .omo/evidence/final-plan-compliance.txt; manual channel is tmux transcript that runs the command and shows PASS. 2) Quality gate: confirm existing final-quality-gate.txt has ruff format/check, basedpyright, and pytest 227 passed; manual channel is tmux transcript that tails the artifact and shows PASS. 3) Real surface QA: confirm existing final-manual-qa.txt, curl final-api-ping/final-csrf-reject, browser screenshots, support zip, and docker cleanup evidence prove API/UI/Docker surfaces; manual channel is HTTP curl and file-artifact transcript. 4) Scope fidelity: confirm final-scope-fidelity.txt final verdict PASS plus no live port/container residue; manual channel is tmux transcript running residue checks. Completion may edit only .omo plan/ledger/boulder/ulw-loop state unless verification reveals a blocker.

successCriteria.scenario: tmux channel: tmux new-session -d -s ulw-qa-f1 'cd /home/user/nfi_engine && python3 scripts/verify_plan_evidence.py .omo/plans/nfi-engine.md .omo/evidence'; tmux capture-pane -pt ulw-qa-f1 -S -200; PASS iff output contains PLAN_EVIDENCE_OK referenced=118 missing=0
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/f1-plan-compliance.txt shows PLAN_EVIDENCE_OK referenced=118 missing=0; cleanup: tmux kill-session ulw-qa-f1, session_removed=1

successCriteria.scenario: tmux channel: tmux new-session -d -s ulw-qa-f2 'cd /home/user/nfi_engine && tail -n 30 .omo/evidence/final-quality-gate.txt'; tmux capture-pane -pt ulw-qa-f2 -S -200; PASS iff output contains All checks passed, 0 errors, and 227 passed
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/f2-quality-gate.txt shows All checks passed, 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 notes, and 227 passed; cleanup: tmux kill-session ulw-qa-f2, session_removed=1

successCriteria.scenario: tmux+HTTP channel: run artifact checks for final-manual-qa.txt, final-api-ping.txt, final-csrf-reject.txt, final-docker-cleanup.txt, final-scope-fidelity.txt, ss port 18080, and docker compose ps; PASS iff UI/API/Docker/scope evidence contains expected PASS markers and no runtime residue remains
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/f3-f4-surface-scope-residue.txt shows CONFIG_APPLIED, READONLY_ACTION_BLOCKED, CSRF_TOKEN_REQUIRED, PASS scope fidelity checks passed, empty 18080 listener check, and compose ps checked; cleanup: tmux kill-session ulw-qa-f3f4, session_removed=1

goals.blockedReason: Project/start-work completion succeeded, but ULW terminal checkpoint is blocked by Codex goal objective mismatch: get_goal returns a completed legacy planning objective instead of the ULW aggregate objective. F1-F4 are complete, start-work ledger complete, Boulder complete, ULW criteria pass, and quality gate 227 passed.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e98e7-5f2f-78b1-9c41-5ed1e6d61e9b/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019e98e7-5f2f-78b1-9c41-5ed1e6d61e9b/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
